title: Requirements for Mobile App Development
text: Requirements for Mobile App Development Uniface takes away a great deal of the complexity of developing mobile apps for Android and iOS devices. However, there are some issues that you will need to manage and address yourself, especially before publishing your app to an app store. Third Party Accounts You need to set up accounts with a hybrid app framework to package your mobile app, and with Google and/or Apple. These agreements are independent of your Uniface license. Hybrid app framework To wrap the mobile app resources into a native wrapper and generate a deployable mobile app package, you will need to use an external hybrid app framework. There are many available, both open source and commercial. Choose the one that best meets your requirements. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
